creator: dickey@invisible-island.net
text:
As noted in

https://bugs.debian.org/cgi-bin/bugreport.cgi?bug=927740

the upstream for devel/blame went away in mid-2018.
I've provided a new homepage for it here:

https://invisible-island.net/rcs-blame/
ftp://ftp.invisible-island.net/rcs-blame
https://invisible-mirror.net/archives/rcs-blame/

(I noticed it because I use this port).
